data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a scheduled start time with a check-in window. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the check-in window is implemented or functioning as required. While the linked use case mentions a scheduled start time and a check-in process, it lacks concrete evidence of the specific implementation details that would demonstrate compliance with this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of a check-in window for the scheduled start time.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
